name: ensembra
description: Multi-agent orchestrator plugin for Claude Code — agents perform in concert through a 5-phase pipeline (Gather → Deliberate → Execute → Audit → Document) with Reuse-First cross-cutting policy.

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API key
gemini_api_key.description: Google AI Studio API key for the architect performer. Get a free key at https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey. Leave blank to disable Gemini — the architect will fall back to a Claude sub-agent. Stored securely in your OS keychain; never written to disk in plaintext.

ollama_endpoint.title: Ollama endpoint
ollama_endpoint.description: Ollama HTTP endpoint for the security and qa performers. Default: http://localhost:11434. Leave blank to skip Ollama — those performers will fall back to Claude sub-agents.
